prompt: I already have Angi set up in my project. I have a ProductFilterPanel component with React state for: category (string), priceMin/priceMax (numbers), inStockOnly (boolean), and sortBy (string). I want users to be able to say things like 'show me electronics under $200 in stock, sorted by rating'. How do I make this component AI-addressable?

assertions.text: Shows <Angi> boundary wrapper with permissions including 'write'
Calls useAngiComponent with a description that mentions filtering/search
getState includes all 4 state values: category, priceMin, priceMax (or similar), inStockOnly, sortBy
Defines separate granular actions for category, price range, stock status, and sort
Price-related action schema uses 'number' type for min/max values
Stock filter action schema uses 'boolean' type for inStockOnly
Includes a clearFilters or reset action
execute functions reference the actual setState calls (not just describe them)
